name: Inside Line
actionText: Ignore all Slide-Out (Grip) penalties for the rest of this turn. +1 Momentum.

name: Manual
actionText: Swap your Row 1 token with your Row 2 token. Draw 1 card if tokens swapped.

name: Flick
actionText: Shift any two tokens on your grid 1 lane toward center.

name: Recover
actionText: Remove 2 Hazard Dice. If none: repair a Penalty Card.
